objects.name: Dust Specter Operator
objects.description: Unattributed state-level intelligence unit. Attribution assessed at LOW-MODERATE confidence to Iran based on targeting profile, operational timeline (July 2025 immediately post-Twelve-Day War), and geopolitical context. False flag scenario unresolved. Infrastructure withdrawn January 2026 prior to Zscaler public disclosure in March 2026.

objects.name: SPLITDROP
objects.description: Chain 1 initial dropper. Deployed via VLC Media Player DLL sideloading. Drops TWINTASK and TWINTALK components to disk.

objects.name: TWINTASK
objects.description: Chain 1 worker module. Polls local file every 15 seconds for Base64-encoded PowerShell commands and executes them. Separates execution role from network role.

objects.name: TWINTALK
objects.description: Chain 1 C2 orchestrator. Beacons to remote server at randomized 108-180 second intervals. Writes Base64-encoded commands to local file for TWINTASK consumption. Contains AI-assisted code generation artifacts: emoji return values (warning emoji as null indicator, speech bubble as data prefix >900,000 chars) and hardcoded seed 0xABCDEF in checksum function. Dynamic URI construction with appended checksum to verify genuine infection.

objects.name: GHOSTFORM
objects.description: Chain 2 consolidated binary. In-memory PowerShell execution with minimal filesystem footprint. Embeds hardcoded Google Form URLs impersonating official Iraqi Ministry of Foreign Affairs surveys (written in Arabic). Dual-layer collection: passive C2 exfiltration plus active social engineering via form submission. Payload previously hosted at meetingapp[.]site/webexdownload -- withdrawn January 2026.

objects.name: Dust Specter C2 -- meetingapp.site (Cisco Webex masquerade)
objects.description: Primary C2 domain. Masquerades as Cisco Webex for Government. GHOSTFORM payload served at /webexdownload path. Geofenced to target geography. Infrastructure withdrawn January 2026. Defanged in report: meetingapp[.]site.

objects.name: Compromised Iraqi government domain -- ca.iq
objects.description: Legitimate Iraqi government infrastructure domain compromised for GHOSTFORM payload hosting. Use of ca[.]iq as payload host is assessed as confirmation of insider access within Iraqi government systems. HIGH confidence.

objects.name: Dust Specter spearphishing RAR -- mofa-Network-code.rar
objects.description: Spearphishing attachment delivered to Iraqi Ministry of Foreign Affairs officials. RAR archive containing SPLITDROP chain components. Filename references Iraqi MFA (mofa = Ministry of Foreign Affairs).

objects.name: Dust Specter TWINTALK beaconing -- randomized 108-180 second interval
objects.description: TWINTALK C2 beaconing uses randomized interval between 108 and 180 seconds to HTTPS destinations to evade pattern-based network detection. URI path is dynamically constructed with appended checksum verifying genuine infection origin.

objects.name: Spearphishing Attachment (T1566.001)
objects.description: RAR archive mofa-Network-code.rar delivered to targeted Iraqi MFA officials.

objects.name: DLL Side-Loading (T1574.002)
objects.description: SPLITDROP deployed via VLC Media Player DLL sideloading.

objects.name: PowerShell (T1059.001)
objects.description: TWINTASK executes Base64-decoded PowerShell commands from local polling file. GHOSTFORM performs in-memory PowerShell execution with minimal filesystem footprint.

objects.name: Obfuscated Files or Information (T1027)
objects.description: Base64 encoding of command payloads in TWINTASK/TWINTALK. In-memory execution in GHOSTFORM with minimal filesystem footprint.

objects.name: Application Layer Protocol: Web Protocols (T1071.001)
objects.description: C2 communication via HTTPS to meetingapp[.]site.

objects.name: Web Service (T1102)
objects.description: Google Forms used as active data solicitation vector embedded in GHOSTFORM. Forms impersonate official Iraqi MFA surveys in Arabic.

objects.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel (T1041)
objects.description: System data and command output exfiltrated via TWINTALK C2 channel.

objects.name: Compromise Infrastructure: Domain (T1584.001)
objects.description: Compromised legitimate Iraqi government domain ca[.]iq used for GHOSTFORM payload hosting.
